1.name: Oktoberfest Gathering
1.beer_mug_reference: 素材/保拉纳啤酒杯素材/1L 用于啤酒节.png
1.beer_mug_description: a 1-liter transparent glass beer mug (Masskrug) — cylindrical clear glass body with a sturdy handle on the side, Paulaner München branded logo on the glass body, raised decorative patterns, filled with golden beer and thick white foam head
1.environment: Munich Oktoberfest elevated wooden balcony with green cast-iron ornamental railing posts. Four round logo signs on blue-white striped poles — LEFT TWO: 'Paulaner München' signs with blue background and white Paulaner logo, RIGHT TWO: 'FC Bayern München' signs with blue background and white FC Bayern crest. These logo signs are DISTINCT and CLEARLY VISIBLE with sharp text and logos. LEFT: decorated Christmas tree with ornaments. RIGHT: red-and-white striped carousel. BACKGROUND: classical white stone building with columns, massive bronze Bavaria statue on pedestal. Overcast cloudy daylight, festive Oktoberfest atmosphere.
1.clothing_tag: grey traditional Bavarian Janker jacket, white shirt, and brown Lederhosen leather shorts
1.clothing_adult: ALL 4 people wear grey traditional Bavarian Janker jackets, white shirts, brown Lederhosen leather shorts, green knee-high socks and dark shoes.
1.clothing_child: The 3 players wear grey traditional Bavarian Janker jackets, white shirts, and brown Lederhosen leather shorts. The child wears matching traditional Bavarian children's clothing.
1.action_adult: THIS IMAGE CONTAINS EXACTLY 4 PEOPLE. Count before rendering: [1] player far left, [2] player center-left, [3] THE FAN center, [4] player far right. Total = 4. They stand tightly shoulder-to-shoulder in ONE single row IN FRONT OF the wooden balcony railing. The fan stands at the SAME height as the players. Each of the 4 people holds a 1-liter transparent glass beer mug (Masskrug) with handle, raised to chest level. All 4 face the camera with warm confident smiles. ABSOLUTE RULE: There is no 5th person, no extra figure. Only 4 bodies, only 4 faces.
1.action_child: The 3 players stand in a tight centered group IN FRONT OF the wooden balcony railing, each holding a 1-liter transparent glass beer mug (Masskrug) with handle raised to chest level. The child fan stands in the absolute center foreground, holding a giant traditional Bavarian pretzel high up near their face with BOTH hands, laughing happily at the camera.

2.name: Locker Room Celebration
2.beer_mug_reference: 素材/保拉纳啤酒杯素材/0.5L 用于更衣室.png
2.beer_mug_description: a tall 0.5-liter Paulaner Weissbier glass — tall slender glass without a handle, filled with golden wheat beer and white foam
2.environment: FC Bayern Munich inner locker room. Dark blue walls, 'PAULANER' white text logos above open lockers. Behind the people are open lockers with jerseys hanging inside. Each jersey in the locker displays its FRONT SIDE toward the viewer: a bright red jersey with white vertical jagged stripes, a large white 'T' symbol (T-Mobile) centered on the chest, and the FC Bayern Munich circular crest badge at the upper-left chest. The jerseys show the SPONSOR LOGO and CLUB BADGE — these elements only appear on the FRONT of the jersey. There is no player number visible on the jerseys. There is no player name visible on the jerseys. ONE single long wooden bench for the 4 people to sit on. Ambient overhead locker room lights.
2.clothing_tag: the 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home kit - bright red jersey with white vertical jagged stripes, white T logo, red shorts, red socks
2.clothing_adult: ALL 4 people wear FC Bayern Munich football kit. The 2 outfield players and the fan wear the EXACT SAME 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home outfield kit: bright red jersey with white vertical soundwave-like jagged stripes, large white T logo on chest, red shorts, red long socks, and black football boots. Manuel Neuer wears his natural green goalkeeper kit with goalkeeper gloves. ALL feet visible on the ground wearing boots.
2.clothing_child: ALL 4 people wear FC Bayern Munich football kit. The 2 outfield players and the child fan wear the 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home outfield kit: bright red jersey, white T logo, red shorts, red socks, black football boots. Manuel Neuer wears his natural green goalkeeper kit.
2.action_adult:
EXACTLY 4 people sit closely side-by-side on the long wooden bench, feet flat on the ground, ALL FACING THE CAMERA with jersey FRONT clearly visible.

BEER GLASS RULE (HIGHEST PRIORITY — MANDATORY FOR ALL 4 PEOPLE):
EVERY SINGLE PERSON holds a tall 0.5-liter Paulaner Weissbier glass (tall slender wheat beer glass without handle, golden beer with white foam) in their hand. There are exactly 4 beer glasses in this image — one per person. NO ONE has empty hands. NO ONE is holding a fist instead of a glass. If a person raises a fist, the OTHER hand STILL HOLDS a beer glass.

HOW TO HOLD THE GLASS (CRITICAL): Each person holds the beer glass upright with a firm grip — fingers wrapped around the glass body, thumb resting on the side. The glass is vertical (90 degrees upright), NOT tilted, NOT angled. The glass is held at chest level or slightly higher, but NEVER above head height. The glass contains golden beer with white foam.

FACE MATCHING IS THE TOP PRIORITY:
- Person 1 (left): MUST look exactly like reference image 2 — reproduce that face with precision.
- Person 2 (center-left): MUST look exactly like reference image 3 — reproduce that face with precision.
- Person 3 (THE FAN, center): MUST look exactly like reference image 1 — reproduce that face with precision. The fan is a full-grown ADULT.
- Person 4 (right): MUST look exactly like reference image 4 — reproduce that face with precision.

CRITICAL: ALL 4 people MUST appear in the image. The fan MUST be visible. Count before rendering: 4 people total, 4 faces visible, 4 beer glasses visible.

ACTION BY PERSON:
- Person 1 (player left): LEFT hand holds a Paulaner Weissbier glass upright at chest level, RIGHT hand raised in a fist pump celebrating
- Person 2 (player center-left): RIGHT hand holds a Paulaner Weissbier glass upright at chest level, LEFT hand raised in a fist pump with big excited smile
- Person 3 (THE FAN, center): RIGHT hand holds a Paulaner Weissbier glass upright at chest level, LEFT hand resting on lap or thigh, cheering with a big excited smile
- Person 4 (player right): LEFT hand holds a Paulaner Weissbier glass upright at chest level, RIGHT hand raised in a fist pump celebrating

VISUAL REFERENCE: All 4 beer glasses are identical — tall slender Weissbier glasses with golden beer and white foam, held upright at chest level. All 4 people are seated on the same wooden bench. All 4 face the camera directly.

JERSEY RULE: Every person faces the camera so the jersey FRONT is fully visible — bright red FC Bayern Munich home jersey with white vertical jagged stripes, large white 'T' logo on chest, FC Bayern circular crest badge visible. NO jersey back visible, NO jersey number visible, NO player name visible.

JERSEY ORIENTATION RULE (CRITICAL): Every person must face the camera FRONTALLY. The jersey FRONT is fully visible — showing bright red fabric, white vertical jagged stripes, large white 'T' logo on chest, and FC Bayern circular crest badge at upper-left chest. The jersey BACK (with player number and name) must NOT be visible. If you render a person showing the back of their jersey (with visible number or name), this is INCORRECT — rotate them 180 degrees to show the FRONT. NO sideways angles, NO rear views, NO three-quarter turns showing the back.
2.action_child: All 4 people sit closely side-by-side on the long wooden bench. The 3 players pump their fists in the air. The child fan sits in the center with feet dangling off the ground, holding a red sports water bottle with both hands, smiling brightly.

3.name: Bernie Mascot Interaction
3.base_image_anchor: 素材/合照/画面3-动作参考.jpg
3.environment: Stadium sideline running track next to the pitch. Background: fans sitting in the stadium seats. ALL background advertising boards display ONLY the blue 'PAULANER 0,0%' logo — absolutely no Audi logo.
3.clothing_tag: the 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home outfield kit — bright red jersey with white vertical jagged stripes and white 'T' logo
3.clothing_adult: ALL 4 human people — every single one including any goalkeeper player — wear the EXACT SAME 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home OUTFIELD kit: bright red jersey with white vertical soundwave-like jagged stripes, large white T logo on chest, and red shorts. ABSOLUTELY NO green jersey, NO goalkeeper kit, NO yellow jersey on any person. Every human wears an identical bright red outfield jersey. Bernie the mascot wears its bear mascot costume.
3.clothing_child: ALL 4 human people wear the EXACT SAME 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home outfield kit: bright red jersey with white vertical jagged stripes, large white T logo, and red shorts. Bernie the mascot wears its bear mascot costume.
3.action_adult:
EXACTLY 5 subjects — 3 players + 1 fan + Bernie the bear mascot. ALL 5 MUST BE FULLY VISIBLE.

CLOTHING (MANDATORY): ALL 4 HUMAN people wear the IDENTICAL FC Bayern Munich 2025/2026 home outfield kit — bright red jersey with white vertical jagged stripes and a large white 'T' logo on the chest, red shorts. Every single human wears this EXACT SAME uniform. NO other colors, NO other styles. Bernie wears the bear mascot costume.

CAMERA (MANDATORY): PERFECTLY STRAIGHT EYE-LEVEL shot. The camera is positioned at the same height as the subjects' faces — looking completely horizontally straight ahead. The horizon line passes through the faces. NO downward tilt, NO overhead angle, NO bird's eye view, NO elevated perspective. The ground is visible at the bottom of the frame, the sky or stadium at the top. This is a flat frontal portrait at human face height.

FAN HEIGHT (CRITICAL - READ FIRST): The fan is a FULL-GROWN ADULT approximately 165-175cm tall — the SAME height as the background players in the frame. Their eye level is EQUAL TO the players' eye level. VISUAL ANCHOR: Draw a horizontal line through their eyes — this same line MUST pass through the players' eyes. Their shoulders are at the SAME HEIGHT as the players' shoulders. They look 20-30 years old, with a fully developed adult body. They are NOT a child, NOT a teenager, NOT petite or miniature, NOT below 160cm. Their head reaches the same level as everyone else's head in the frame. If you must resize a person to match heights, DO NOT change their body proportions — simply scale them so their eye levels align horizontally. DO NOT render the fan at a different height than the players. The fan's gender MUST match reference image 1 — male users appear as men, female users appear as women.

BERNIE HEIGHT (MANDATORY): Bernie the bear mascot is the SAME HEIGHT as the fan — approximately 165-175cm. Their heads are at the same level. Bernie does NOT tower over the fan.

ACTION (MANDATORY): FOREGROUND CENTER: THE FAN and Bernie the bear mascot face EACH OTHER at close distance. They are HIGH-FIVING — the fan raises their RIGHT hand, Bernie raises its LEFT paw, their palms meet in a HIGH-FIVE gesture in the center of the frame. Both have big happy smiles. The fan's face is clearly visible. Bernie's bear face is clearly visible. This is a dynamic high-five action shot, not a static posed photo. CRITICAL: The fan's body and Bernie's body are TWO SEPARATE ENTITIES — they do not merge or overlap. The fan has human skin arms. Bernie has furry bear arms. There is a clear visual boundary between the fan's body and Bernie's costume.

BACKGROUND: Three players stand directly behind, fully visible from head to toe, arms raised cheering, clapping, or celebrating.
3.action_child: MANDATORY: EXACTLY 5 subjects — 4 people PLUS Bernie. THERE MUST BE A FAN IN THIS IMAGE. FOREGROUND CENTER: The child fan (wearing red jersey) and Bernie the bear mascot face each other, the child enthusiastically giving Bernie a high-five while looking up at Bernie with a big smile. BACKGROUND: The 3 tall adult players stand behind in a loose arc, smiling and clapping, all wearing identical bright red FC Bayern Munich jerseys.

4.name: Championship Shower
4.beer_mug_reference: 素材/保拉纳啤酒杯素材/3L啤酒塔 用于啤酒浴.png
4.beer_mug_description: a medium-sized transparent Paulaner beer glass WITHOUT any handle — straight cylindrical glass body approximately 18-22cm tall (about half the length of a forearm), cup mouth slightly wider than the body, thick bottom, featuring Paulaner brand logo on the body, filled with golden beer and white foam
4.environment: Allianz Arena football pitch at night. Spectacular stadium atmosphere with red illuminated stadium roof and distant empty stands. Dramatic high-contrast night stadium floodlights illuminating the grass. ONLY exactly 4 people on the pitch — nobody else.
4.clothing_tag: the 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home outfield kit — bright red jersey with white vertical jagged stripes and white T logo
4.clothing_adult: MANDATORY — ALL 4 people wear the EXACT SAME 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home OUTFIELD kit: bright red jersey with white vertical soundwave-like jagged stripes, large white T logo on chest, and red shorts. This includes Manuel Neuer — he wears the SAME red outfield jersey, NOT a goalkeeper jersey. ABSOLUTELY NO green jersey, NO yellow jersey, NO different color. Every single person wears the same bright red outfield jersey.
4.clothing_child: MANDATORY — ALL 4 people wear the EXACT SAME 2025/2026 FC Bayern Munich home outfield kit: bright red jersey with white vertical soundwave-like jagged stripes, large white T logo on chest, and red shorts. NO goalkeeper jersey, NO green jersey.
4.action_adult:
EXACTLY 4 ADULTS standing on the pitch. Real football championship celebration — a PLAYER pours beer from a Paulaner glass onto the fan's head.

HEIGHT RULE (CRITICAL): ALL 4 ADULTS stand at THE SAME EYE LEVEL — their heads are aligned horizontally. The fan is a FULL-GROWN ADULT (20-30 years old, approximately 170-175cm tall), standing upright. The fan's shoulders are at the EXACT SAME HEIGHT as the players' shoulders. VISUAL ANCHOR: All four pairs of eyes align on a horizontal line. DO NOT render the fan shorter than the players.

CLOTHING (MANDATORY): ALL 4 people wear the IDENTICAL FC Bayern Munich 2025/2026 home outfield kit — bright red jersey with white vertical jagged stripes and a large white 'T' logo on the chest, red shorts. ABSOLUTELY NO green jersey on anyone.

BEER GLASS SIZE AND SHAPE (CRITICAL — FOLLOW EXACTLY):
The beer glass is a SMALL transparent cylindrical glass — approximately 20cm tall, which is roughly HALF the length of a human forearm. The glass is SMALLER than the player's forearm. It fits easily in two cupped hands. It is NOT a giant oversized glass, NOT a massive tower. It is a normal everyday beer glass size. The glass has NO handle, NO side grip — it is a simple smooth cylinder with Paulaner logo. The glass mouth is slightly wider than the base. Refer to the composition reference image for exact size proportions.

POURING ACTION (FOLLOW EXACTLY):
- Player A stands to the LEFT of the fan
- Player A holds the beer glass with TWO HANDS — RIGHT hand grips near the top rim of the glass, LEFT hand supports the middle-lower body of the glass
- Player A raises BOTH arms upward so the glass is held HIGH ABOVE the fan's head (the open top of the glass is approximately 10-20cm above the fan's head)
- The glass is tilted forward so its OPEN TOP RIM faces downward — golden beer and white foam pour OUT from the top opening
- The beer flows in a natural downward trajectory through open air — cascading onto the fan's head and shoulders like a golden waterfall with white foam splashing
- The beer stream is clearly OUTSIDE the glass, flowing freely through air by gravity
- The fan's red jersey becomes visibly wet from the beer on head, shoulders, and upper chest

FAN POSE: THE FAN stands at CENTER, body slightly leaning back, head tilted slightly upward with mouth open wide laughing joyfully. Arms slightly out to the sides. The fan enjoys the celebration.

BACKGROUND: The other TWO players stand BEHIND the fan, smiling and watching the celebration, slightly spread out. One may have arms crossed or hands on hips.

ALL 4 at the SAME eye-level height. Golden beer arc catches stadium floodlights as liquid cascades from above.
4.action_child: EXACTLY 4 people on the pitch. The child fan stands center looking up, mouth open laughing. One player stands right next to them, popping a confetti cannon to rain colorful confetti over the child's head. The other two players stand behind, laughing and watching.
